overallMatch.summary: Strong enterprise specialty seller and RSD in Greater China with sustained over-attainment and coaching themes that fit AE/SC interlock and territory strategy. Main gap is explicit Moveworks/ServiceNow/AI assistant product depth versus HR-Finance SaaS depth; Hong Kong matches the posting. Clarify SSE vs RSD-level expectations and comp band early.

granularScores.rationale: Consultative ROI and specialty solution selling; trilingual APAC coverage. Resume lacks direct Moveworks/ServiceNow/ITSM AI footprint—lean on transferable enterprise transformation stories.
15+ years Greater China SaaS; RSD + AE path matches account planning and coaching; Microsoft Solution Sales Manager parallels specialist overlay. May read senior vs typical SSE—confirm scope.
Bachelor of Accounting (Curtin) supports business case and CFO-line selling; typical bar met.
Hong Kong SAR aligns with Remote, Hong Kong; 30–50% travel feasible across APAC.
Multiple enterprise vendors (Workday, Microsoft, Oracle, Infor); reframing from HCM/Finance to agentic employee AI is a focused narrative exercise.
ServiceNow acquisition expands platform TAM; growth depends on specialty leadership vs IC specialist track.
Band unclear; RSD and top-AE history may sit above typical SSE—validate grade and OTE in first screens.

jobRequirements.evidence: Prepare Workday/enterprise digital transformation + responsible AI learning agenda; add honest AI-adjacent bullets
15+ years enterprise sales; repeated over-attainment; complex HR/Finance transformations
Regional Sales Director; quota-carrying AE track at Workday
Full-cycle enterprise sales; account and territory management
Greater China coverage; confirm APAC vs global travel mix

jobRequirements.requirement: Territory strategy & account planning with AEs
jobRequirements.evidence: RSD leading Large Enterprise & Customer Base; account planning across HK/China

jobRequirements.requirement: SC interlock & coaching AEs/ADRs on specialty solutions
jobRequirements.evidence: Team leadership; Microsoft Solution Sales; consultative complex cycles

jobRequirements.requirement: ServiceNow / Moveworks AI product fluency post-acquisition
jobRequirements.evidence: Not on resume yet—study public AI Assistant, Reasoning Engine, EmployeeWorks narrative

strengths: Quota-carrying RSD + AE path with documented over-attainment (e.g. team 118–143% FY24–FY26; standout IC years)
Microsoft Solution Sales Manager and Oracle HCM pioneer — specialty and displacement DNA
Named Greater China wins and competitive replacements (HK and China logos)
Hong Kong base — exact fit for Remote, Hong Kong posting
English, Cantonese, Mandarin for APAC enterprise
Coaching and regional leadership aligned with enablement language in posting

gaps.gap: Explicit Moveworks / ServiceNow / agentic AI product credentials on resume
gaps.recommendation: Add 2–3 honest lines on AI in enterprise workflows and learning plan; build one-page public-info cheat sheet.

gaps.gap: Domain skew from HR/Finance SaaS to IT/employee service AI narrative
gaps.recommendation: Reframe wins around employee productivity, knowledge, deflection, and governance—not only HR modules.

gaps.gap: Seniority (RSD) vs Solution Sales Executive band
gaps.recommendation: Clarify IC vs overlay vs player-coach; align title narrative with recruiter in first call.
Ask range and ServiceNow grade post-acquisition to avoid late-stage mismatch.

interviewPrepFocus: Dec 2025 ServiceNow acquisition — agentic AI and ServiceNow AI Platform joint value
AE and SC interlock — concrete Workday/Microsoft examples
90-day HK/APAC territory hypothesis and mutual planning with core AEs
Two quantified ROI stories told for IT + HR stakeholders
Travel 30–50% — APAC scope and customer density
actionableRecommendations: Update LinkedIn/resume with a concise AI & enterprise transformation bullet tied to real experience
Draft a 90-day territory + AE enablement plan for Moveworks specialty solutions
Build a one-page Moveworks + ServiceNow synergy reference from public sources
In recruiter screen: quota ownership, overlay vs direct, reporting line, success metrics for Q1–Q2
Practice discovery language for agentic AI (governance, outcomes, adoption)—not generic chatbot pitches

highlights.executiveSummary: Moveworks delivers an agentic AI assistant, enterprise search, and Reasoning Engine for workforce automation. Acquired by ServiceNow (announced Mar 2025, completed Dec 15, 2025) for roughly $2.85–2.9B; integrated into ServiceNow AI Platform narrative with ~5.5M users and ~250 mutual customers cited at close.
highlights.leadership: Bhavin Shah leads Moveworks into ServiceNow integration; Bill McDermott (Chairman & CEO) and Amit Zavery (President, COO, CPO) anchor parent GTM and platform AI strategy.
highlights.products: AI Assistant, Reasoning Engine, enterprise search; deep ServiceNow workflow integration; post-close themes such as EmployeeWorks and packaged AI platform plays.
highlights.culture: High-performance enterprise SaaS; Glassdoor aggregates ~3.8/5 (directional). Post-acquisition: clarify quota, territory, and reporting with hiring team.
highlights.recommendation: Strong for specialty sellers who can prove ROI and partner with AEs/SCs; diligence on APAC remote support, travel reality, and SSE vs senior overlay expectations.
